summary: This role presents a significant risk to your long-term wellbeing due to a 90% injury rate and a high burnout potential that often forces career transitions within 15 years. The heavy reliance on applied physics and real-time analytical calculations directly conflicts with your preference for protocol-driven work and your struggles with math-heavy reasoning. Furthermore, the unpredictable on-call shifts and high-stress clinical environments fail to meet your requirements for predictable hours and a sustainable, low-stress career path.
